final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input we,
    input [3:0] addr,
    input [15:0] data_in,
    output reg [15:0] data_out
);
    reg [15:0] unused_memory [0:15]; // 16 unused_memory cells of 16 bits each

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            unused_memory[addr] <= data_in; // Write data to unused_memory
        end else begin
            data_out <= unused_memory[addr]; // Read data from unused_memory
        end
    end
endmodule
